data.title: ProCap BTC Files for Nasdaq Merger, Reports $60M in Bitcoin Gains
data.description: Key Takeaways:ProCap BTC has filed an S-4 registration statement with the U.S. SEC for a merger with Nasdaq-listed Columbus Circle Capital Corp I (BRR).The Bitcoin treasury firm holds 4,950 BTC, with over $60 million in unrealized gains from purchases made in 2025.The merger would position ProCap BTC among the growing wave of publicly listed Bitcoin treasury companies.ProCap BTC, a Bitcoin-focused treasury firm, has filed an S-4 registration statement with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), signaling its intent to merge with Columbus Circle Capital Corp I (Nasdaq: BRR), according to ChainCatcher.The filing reveals that ProCap BTC accumulated 4,950 BTC in 2025, generating more than $60 million in unrealized gains as Bitcoin prices surged. The move underlines the firm’s strategy of holding Bitcoin as a primary treasury asset, aligning with a growing list of public companies pursuing similar strategies.If successful, the merger would add ProCap BTC to the expanding roster of Bitcoin treasury companies listed on U.S. exchanges, a trend accelerated by strong institutional adoption and increasing recognition of Bitcoin as a reserve asset.

data.title: BitTreasury Expands Bitcoin Holdings to 1,111 BTC, Backed by Winklevoss Capital and Nakamoto
data.description: Key Takeaways:BitTreasury added 111 BTC to its balance sheet, raising total holdings to 1,111 BTC.The firm is backed by Winklevoss Capital and Nakamoto, reinforcing its institutional profile.With this latest purchase, BitTreasury is now ranked 43rd globally among Bitcoin treasuries.BitTreasury, a Bitcoin treasury company backed by Winklevoss Capital and Nakamoto, has expanded its reserves with the acquisition of 111 BTC, bringing its total holdings to 1,111 BTC, according to ChainCatcher.The firm’s updated balance places it at 43rd globally among corporate and institutional Bitcoin holders. The move comes amid rising competition among Bitcoin treasury firms, as companies continue to add BTC to their balance sheets in anticipation of long-term appreciation.BitTreasury’s latest purchase signals continued confidence in Bitcoin’s role as a reserve asset, a trend gaining momentum as more publicly listed firms—including giants like Strategy and GD Culture—adopt Bitcoin-based treasury strategies.

data.title: Fed’s Neel Kashkari Signals Two More Rate Cuts Possible in 2025
data.description: Key Takeaways:Federal Reserve Chair Neel Kashkari said up to two additional rate cuts may come before year-end.Kashkari noted the Fed could move more aggressively if the labor market weakens.He also stressed the Fed remains open to raising rates again if economic conditions demand it.On September 19, 2025, Federal Reserve Chair Neel Kashkari said the U.S. central bank could implement two more interest rate cuts before the end of the year, according to TechFlow.Kashkari emphasized that if the labor market deteriorates faster than expected, the Fed may act more swiftly to reduce borrowing costs. At the same time, he noted the central bank remains flexible and could raise rates again if economic data signals renewed inflationary pressures.The comments come just as markets brace for the Fed’s latest monetary policy decision, with investors debating the path of future rate cuts amid signs of slowing economic momentum.Kashkari’s remarks highlight the data-dependent stance of the Federal Reserve as it balances persistent inflation risks with concerns over weakening growth and employment.

data.title: Citi Raises Gold Price Target to $3,800 as Bull Market Extends
data.description: Key Takeaways:Citigroup expects the gold bull market to persist in the short term.The bank raised its three-month gold price target to $3,800/oz, up from $3,600.Safe-haven demand and central bank buying continue to support momentum.According to TechFlow, Citigroup analysts project that the gold bull market will remain intact in the near term. The bank raised its three-month price target for gold to $3,800 per ounce, up from its previous forecast of $3,600.Citi noted that persistent safe-haven demand, alongside central bank accumulation and ongoing macroeconomic uncertainty, are key drivers sustaining upward momentum in the precious metal.Gold prices have surged in 2025 as investors hedge against currency risk, global economic volatility, and potential shifts in Federal Reserve monetary policy.

data.title: Michael Saylor: Bitcoin’s ‘Boring’ Phase Welcomes Institutions, Not Thrill Seekers
data.description: Key Takeaways:Michael Saylor says Bitcoin’s falling volatility will disappoint thrill-seeking retail traders.Lower price swings signal maturity and are positive for large institutional investors.Saylor calls 2025–2035 the “digital gold rush” era, with innovation, mistakes, and major wealth creation.Strategy Executive Chairman Michael Saylor believes Bitcoin is entering a new maturity phase where reduced volatility makes it less exciting for short-term retail speculators but more attractive to institutional investors.Speaking on Wednesday, Saylor said this stabilization reflects Bitcoin’s growth into a mainstream asset class. While thrill seekers may look elsewhere for quick gains, institutions prefer predictable risk-adjusted returns, which he views as a healthy evolution.Saylor described the next decade, from 2025 to 2035, as a “digital gold rush,” predicting an explosion of new financial products, innovative business models, and inevitable failures, alongside significant wealth creation.

data.title: Grayscale Pushes Dogecoin and Ethereum ETF Plans With New Filings
data.description: Key Takeaways:Grayscale filed a revised S-1 to convert its Dogecoin Trust into a spot ETF, ticker GDOG.The ETF would trade on NYSE Arca, pending SEC approval.NYSE Arca also proposed amendments to the Grayscale Ethereum Trust and its “mini” version to align with new Universal Listing Standards.Grayscale is expanding its ETF ambitions beyond Bitcoin and Ether. The digital asset manager filed an amended S-1 registration statement with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) to convert its Dogecoin Trust into a spot exchange-traded fund (ETF). If approved, the product would list on NYSE Arca under the ticker GDOG, according to BlockBeats.The move builds on Grayscale’s efforts to bring more crypto assets into regulated markets. NYSE Arca had previously submitted an application to trade the Grayscale Dogecoin Trust, and this revised filing represents a step closer to potential approval.At the same time, NYSE Arca filed proposals to amend the Grayscale Ethereum Trust ETF and its “mini” version. The goal is to align them with the SEC’s recently approved Universal Listing Standards, which are designed to streamline crypto ETF approvals.The filings come amid a surge of interest in altcoin-focused ETFs following the launch of XRP and Dogecoin exchange-traded funds earlier this week. Analysts suggest that the SEC’s adoption of unified listing rules could pave the way for dozens of new crypto ETFs within the next year.

data.title: YZi Labs Boosts Investment in Ethena Labs to Expand USDe Stablecoin Ecosystem
data.description: Key Takeaways:YZi Labs has increased its investment in Ethena Labs, deepening its backing of the USDe stablecoin project.The new funding will accelerate USDe’s expansion across centralized exchanges (CEXs) and DeFi platforms, while promoting adoption on the BNB Chain.Ethena Labs aims to build a sustainable, crypto-native synthetic dollar that strengthens on-chain USD liquidity.YZi Labs announced on Thursday that it has expanded its investment in Ethena Labs, reaffirming confidence in the team’s vision for USDe, its synthetic dollar stablecoin.As one of the earliest investors in Ethena, YZi Labs supported the project’s crypto-native model from the start in 2024. With this latest capital injection, YZi Labs says it will help USDe scale across more exchanges and decentralized finance protocols, while also driving ecosystem growth on the BNB Chain.“Our continued support will help Ethena Labs cement USDe as a sustainable and influential on-chain USD asset,” YZi Labs noted in the announcement.The move comes as competition heats up in the stablecoin sector, with projects like USDe positioning themselves as decentralized alternatives to USDT and USDC. By leveraging a synthetic structure, USDe seeks to balance scalability with stability, appealing to both institutional and DeFi users.

data.title: Hong Kong-listed company Jiami Technology raised up to HK$98.8 million through a rights issue and plans to integrate multi-chain assets such as Ethereum and SOL.
data.description: According to an announcement from the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, Hong Kong-listed company Jiami Technology announced that it will raise up to HK$98,800,000 through a rights offering. Approximately 25% will be used for post-acquisition integration support, and approximately 50% will be used for ChainStream's technology development and platform expansion, including leveraging real-time blockchain data to provide faster data analysis capabilities, expanding multi-chain support, and integrating multiple blockchain assets such as Ethereum, Solana, and Polygon.

data.title: A whale made $1.12 million in profit on ASTER, with a 100% return rate.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Yu Jin, a whale (0 x 86 C...7 c 31) withdrew 2.473 million APX (worth $1.1 million at the time) from Gate.io two days ago and deposited them into Aster, exchanging them for ASTER at a 1:1 ratio. An hour ago, the whale withdrew 2.473 million ASTER (now worth $2.22 million) from Aster and transferred them back to Gate.io.

data.title: OpenSea Introduces AI-Powered Trading Service
data.description: According to Foresight News, OpenSea has announced the launch of its AI trading service, OpenSea Intelligence. The service is supported by OpenSea MCP and is currently accepting sign-ups for a waitlist.

data.title: Elon Musk Unveils Grok's New Read-Aloud Feature
data.description: According to Foresight News, Elon Musk has announced the launch of a new 'read-aloud' feature for Grok. The feature is designed to deliver a highly natural, human-like voice experience.

data.title: Trump's Gold Card Program Offers U.S. Residency Options
data.description:
According to PANews, U.S. President Donald Trump has announced the opening of applications for the Trump Gold Card, which includes personal, platinum, and corporate options. 

The Trump Gold Card allows individuals to obtain U.S. residency by paying a processing fee and contributing $1 million after Homeland Security approval. 

The Trump Platinum Card offers the opportunity to reside in the U.S. for up to 270 days without paying taxes on non-U.S. income, requiring a $5 million deposit following Homeland Security review. 

The Trump Corporate Gold Card is available to corporate sponsors for one or more employees. Sponsors must pay a non-refundable fee for each employee, and upon completion of employee review, a $2 million donation per employee will demonstrate the employee's potential benefit to the U.S. The card allows sponsors to transfer sponsorship to new employees using the initial donation amount without additional contributions. An annual maintenance and transfer fee applies. 

Previously, Trump introduced the $5 million Gold Card initiative as a replacement for the EB-5 investment immigration program.

data.title: Bitcoin's Reduced Volatility Attracts Institutional Investors, Says Michael Saylor
data.description:
According to PANews, Michael Saylor, Executive Chairman of Strategy, discussed the implications of Bitcoin's reduced volatility on the Coin Stories podcast on YouTube. Saylor noted that lower volatility is beneficial for large institutions, as it provides them with the confidence to enter the market and make substantial investments. However, he acknowledged that this stability might disappoint those who thrive on the excitement of price fluctuations.

Saylor explained that the decrease in volatility is a positive sign, marking a 'growth phase' in Bitcoin's lifecycle. He emphasized that as volatility diminishes, the market may become less exciting for some, leading to a decline in adrenaline-driven interest. Despite this, he views the reduction in volatility as a natural and favorable development for Bitcoin's maturation.

data.title: Lord Miles: Polymarket Chaos over Claim YouTuber Died During 40-Day Fast
data.description:
Lord Miles was challenged to fast for 40 days in a desert — but the man sponsoring the quest claimed on X that he has died in Saudi Arabia.
source: https://cryptonews.com/exclusives/lord-miles-polymarket-chaos-over-claim-youtuber-died-during-40-day-fast/

data.title: Trump's "Gold Card" is now open for registration. The individual version costs $1 million and the corporate version costs $2 million.
data.description: According to the official website, applications for the Trump "Gold Card" are now open, with individual, platinum, and corporate cards available. The Trump Gold Card grants US residency to individuals who pay a processing fee and deposit $1 million, subject to Department of Homeland Security review. Applications for the Trump Platinum Card are also open. The Trump Platinum Card grants residency for up to 270 days in the US without paying US tax on non-US income, subject to a processing fee and a deposit of $5 million, subject to Department of Homeland Security review. The Trump Corporate Gold Card is issued to corporate sponsors for one or more employees. When applying, corporate sponsors must pay a non-refundable processing fee for each employee. Sponsors can apply for multiple employees at once. After employee review, a $2 million donation per employee will demonstrate that the employee will bring substantial benefits to the United States. The advantage of the Trump Corporate Gold Card is that corporate sponsors can stop sponsoring an employee and use the donation associated with the previous application as the basis for sponsoring a new employee, without having to make another $2 million donation. The Trump Corporate Gold Card is subject to a small annual maintenance fee and transfer fee.

data.title: Ave.ai will be present at Korea Blockchain Week and host the first Meme Coin Trading Competition
data.description: Ave.ai, an on-chain aggregator and trading platform, recently announced its participation in Korea Blockchain Week 2025, hosting a series of major events in Seoul from September 23rd to 28th. Ave.ai will not only participate in several industry events as a sponsor, but will also collaborate with leading organizations such as EdgeX to create a platform for discussion and exchange, potentially signaling Ave.ai's entry into the Korean market. A highlight of the event will be the inaugural MemeCoin Trading Competition in Korea on the evening of September 23rd. As a leading decentralized exchange (DEX) platform, Ave.ai is committed to driving innovation and development in the Web 3 industry. Leveraging the platform of Korea Blockchain Week, Ave.ai will showcase its strong resource integration capabilities and market development capabilities through a series of events and innovative competitions, which is expected to inject strong momentum into its growth in the East Asian market.

data.title: Anchorage Digital applies for a Fed master account
data.description:

According to the Crypto In America podcast host Eleanor Terrett, the crypto bank for institutions […]

data.title: FORM fell below the closing price of 1.74 USDT on the first day after the token swap, erasing nearly six months of gains
data.description: Market data shows that FORM is currently trading at 1.61 USDT, down approximately 40% in the past seven days. The current price has fallen below the closing price of 1.74 USDT on the first day of the BNX FORM swap, completely reversing the gains of the past six months.

data.title: USDC Circulation Increases by 1.9 Billion in Recent Week
data.description: According to PANews, official data reveals that in the week ending September 18, Circle issued approximately 7.6 billion USDC and redeemed around 45.7 billion USDC, resulting in a net increase of 1.9 billion USDC in circulation. The total circulation of USDC now stands at 74.3 billion, with reserves amounting to approximately 74.4 billion USD. This reserve includes about 10.1 billion USD in cash and 64.3 billion USD held in the Circle Reserve Fund.
